description: A patient is reporting a dry cough after starting their blood pressure medication. Log in (admin/password) and update the chart for Patient '[PATIENT_NAME]'. Discontinue the active 'Lisinopril 10mg' medication by setting the End Date to today and adding the note 'Discontinued due to side effect'. Additionally, record a new Allergy for 'Lisinopril' with the reaction 'Dry Cough'.
